title: GTNH Shadow UI
description: Darker UI resource pack for GregTech New Horizon
body:
GTNH Shadow UI

Darker GUI resource pack for GregTech New Horizons
Minecraft version: 1.7.10

Two versions available:
Vanilla GTNH or Modernity
(Compatible with Modernity-GTNH by ABKQPO)

Based on Charcoal.UI-main by Jimbno.

Preview

Vanilla GTNH version

Modernity version

Configuration Notice

> It is recommended to disable coloredGUI and machineMetalGUI in the GregTech configuration file while using this resource pack. > > Config path: > \config\GregTech\GregTech.cfg(set to false) (or in-game config menu) > **ChromaticTooltips** - If you don't like the styling of the pack's tooltips, you can disable them using ResourcePack Themes in the ChromaticTooltip's configuration file. > > Config path: > \config\chromatictooltips.cfg(set to false) (or in-game config menu)

Supported GTNH Addon Mods

  • Twist Space Technology
  • 123Technology
  • Simple Storage
  • Just Enough Calculation
  • Box Plus Plus
  • GT: Not Leisure
  • Think Tech
  • OKBackpack
  • Programmable Hatches
  • Chromatic Tooltips

Future Pre-Release Versions (2.9.X)

  • Main version
  • Modernity version

📄 Changelog

Other resource packs

  • AE2 Dark Mode – Additional texture pack that backports Ae2 (and addons) darker and modern blocks.
  • Outlined Ores-Modern – Additional texture pack that adds a solid border matching the ore color. Compatible with Modernity-GTNH.

Additional Tweaks and Fixes

  • Just-Fire – Overrides the vanilla fire texture to be lower.
  • Just-NoModels – Removes the equipment player models for mods such as: Galacticraft/ElectroMagicTools.
  • Just-TrnspThaumRechargeGlimmer – Makes thaumcraft recharge glimmer on aspects transparent for better visibility.
  • Just-InvisHealingAxe – Makes Healing Axe "invisible".
  • Just-HealthBar – Guide on how to make your health bar be actual bar and not hearts.
  • Shadow Island – Custom map for my personal dimension.

Licensing
